content: Upload your logo or generate it from text to provide on-brand experience to your users. These settings will affect all of your portals.

comment.text: This translation key is used for the "BrandingSubtitleMobile" subtitle in mobile portals, which explains the purpose of branding settings and their impact on user experience. It appears on a setting page or similar UI element.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'aseutukset' is a typo/incorrect word; the correct word for 'settings' in Finnish is 'asetukset'. 'Aseutukset' refers to arming or militarization.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Lataa logosi tai luo se tekstistä tarjotaksesi brändikokemuksen käyttäjillesi. Nämä asetukset vaikuttavat kaikkiin portaaleihisi.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'on-brand experience' is incorrect. It was translated as 'experiență de creștere a implicării și de conștientizare a mărcii' (experience of increasing engagement and brand awareness), which changes the meaning from 'an experience consistent with the brand' to a marketing goal of 'increasing awareness'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Încărcați logo-ul dvs. sau generați unul din text pentru a oferi utilizatorilor dvs. o experiență în conformitate cu identitatea mărcii. Aceste setări vor afecta toate portalurile dvs.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'on-brand experience' is translated as 'информацию о бренде' (brand information), which changes the meaning from providing a consistent brand identity/experience to simply providing information about the brand.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Загрузите свой логотип или сгенерируйте его из текста, чтобы обеспечить пользователям брендированный интерфейс. Эти настройки повлияют на все ваши порталы.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'portals' is translated as 'ປະຕູ' (pa-tu), which literally means a physical door or gate. In a software/web context, 'portals' should be transliterated or referred to as web portals/platforms to avoid sounding like physical doors.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ອັບໂຫຼດໂລໂກ້ຂອງທ່ານ ຫຼືສ້າງມັນຈາກຂໍ້ຄວາມເພື່ອສະໜອງປະສົບການໃນຍີ່ຫໍ້ໃຫ້ກັບຜູ້ໃຊ້ຂອງທ່ານ. ການຕັ້ງຄ່າເຫຼົ່ານີ້ຈະສົ່ງຜົນກະທົບຕໍ່ທຸກໆພອດທໍຂອງທ່ານ.
